oldBenefit: Gain additional Hit Points when catching a Second Wind.
newEffect: Gain additional Hit Points when catching a Second Wind.
oldSummary: Gain additional Hit Points when catching a Second Wind.
newSummary: Gain additional Hit Points when catching a Second Wind.

name: Rapid Assault
oldPrerequisite: Double Attack or Dual Weapon Mastery I, Base Attack Bonus +6
newPrerequisite: Double Attack or Dual Weapon Mastery I, Base Attack Bonus +6
oldBenefit: Through focus and raw determination, you can make multiple attacks even after moving.
newEffect:
If you are wielding two weapons or a weapon with which you can use the Double Attack feat, you may spend a Force Point to make two attacks as a Standard Action.

The normal penalties due to attacking with two weapons or using Double Attack still apply, and you cannot make more than two attacks regardless of how many extra attacks you can make during a Full Attack Action.
oldSummary: Through focus and raw determination, you can make multiple attacks even after moving.
newSummary: Through focus and raw determination, you can make multiple attacks even after moving.

name: Collateral Damage
oldBenefit: Gain extra attack upon hitting the first target.
newEffect: When you deal damage with a single, non- Area Attack using the Rapid Shot Feat, once per turn on your turn, you can immediately make a second attack at a -2 penalty against a second target within 2 squares of the first. If this attack hits, you deal half the original attack's damage to that target.
oldSummary: Gain extra attack upon hitting the first target.
newSummary: Gain extra attack upon hitting the first target.

name: Running Attack
oldBenefit: Move before and after making an attack.
newEffect: When making an attack with a melee or ranged weapon, you can move both before and after the attack, provided that the total distance moved is not greater than your Speed.
oldSummary: Move before and after making an attack.
newSummary: Move before and after making an attack.

name: Anointed Hunter
oldBenefit: Move 2 or more squares and gain a +1 bonus on attacks with Thrown Weapons until the end of your turn.
newEffect: If you end your Move at least 2 squares from where you started, you gain a +1 competence bonus on attacks made with Thrown Weapons until the end of your turn.
oldSummary: Move 2 or more squares and gain a +1 bonus on attacks with Thrown Weapons until the end of your turn.
newSummary: Move 2 or more squares and gain a +1 bonus on attacks with Thrown Weapons until the end of your turn.

name: Extra Second Wind
oldBenefit: Gain an additional Second Wind per day.
newEffect: You can catch your Second Wind one additional time per day, but you can still only catch a Second Wind once per encounter.
oldSummary: Gain an additional Second Wind per day.
newSummary: Gain an additional Second Wind per day.

name: Delay Damage
oldBenefit: Once per encounter, you may delay the effects of damage taken until the end of your next turn.
newEffect: Once per encounter, you may delay the effects of damage taken until the end of your next turn.
oldSummary: Once per encounter, you may delay the effects of damage taken until the end of your next turn.
newSummary: Once per encounter, you may delay the effects of damage taken until the end of your next turn.

name: Blaster Barrage
oldBenefit: Automatically Aid Another when using Autofire attacks.
newEffect: When you make an attack with a weapon set on Autofire that deals damage to at least one target within the designated area, you grant a +2 circumstance bonus on any of your allies' Autofire attacks made against that same target until the beginning of your next turn.
oldSummary: Automatically Aid Another when using Autofire attacks.
newSummary: Automatically Aid Another when using Autofire attacks.

name: Opportunistic Retreat
oldBenefit: Sacrifice Attack of Opportunity to move at half speed.
newEffect: Whenever an opponent provokes an Attack of Opportunity from you, once per turn you can sacrifice the attack to move a number of squares equal to one-half your Speed. Moving in this way does not provoke Attacks of Opportunity.
oldSummary: Sacrifice Attack of Opportunity to move at half speed.
newSummary: Sacrifice Attack of Opportunity to move at half speed.

name: Stand Tall
oldBenefit: When you take damage, nearby allies attack your attacker.
newEffect: Once per encounter when you take damage, all allies who are within 6 squares of you and within your line of sight can, as a Reaction, make a single attack on the target that damaged you.
oldSummary: When you take damage, nearby allies attack your attacker.
newSummary: When you take damage, nearby allies attack your attacker.

name: Sith Military Training
oldBenefit: Upon debilitating an opponent, you can cause other opponents to lose heart.
newEffect: Once per encounter, as a Reaction when you reduce a target to 0 Hit Points or deal damage that exceeds the target's Damage Threshold, you can activate this Feat to cause all enemies within 6 squares of that target to take a -2 penalty to all Defenses until the end of your next turn. This is a Mind-Affecting effect.
oldSummary: Upon debilitating an opponent, you can cause other opponents to lose heart.
newSummary: Upon debilitating an opponent, you can cause other opponents to lose heart.

name: Attack Combo (Fire and Strike)
oldPrerequisite: Attack Combo (Melee), Attack Combo (Ranged), Base Attack Bonus +9
newPrerequisite: Attack Combo (Melee), Attack Combo (Ranged), Base Attack Bonus +9
oldBenefit: Deal +1 die of damage on Unarmed, melee, or ranged attacks until the end of your next turn after hitting an enemy with two Unarmed, melee, or ranged attacks.
newEffect: If you hit a single target with two consecutive ranged, melee, and/or Unarmed attacks during the same turn, any additional ranged, melee, or Unarmed attacks you make until the end of your next turn (including Attacks of Opportunity and attacks made as Reactions) deal +1 die of damage on a hit. This extra damage stacks with extra damage granted by other Feats or Talents.
oldSummary: Deal +1 die of damage on Unarmed, melee, or ranged attacks until the end of your next turn after hitting an enemy with two Unarmed, melee, or ranged attacks.
newSummary: Deal +1 die of damage on Unarmed, melee, or ranged attacks until the end of your next turn after hitting an enemy with two Unarmed, melee, or ranged attacks.

name: Force Boon
oldBenefit: Gain three additional Force Points at each level.
newEffect: You gain three additional Force Points at each level.
oldSummary: Gain three additional Force Points at each level.
newSummary: Gain three additional Force Points at each level.

name: Unwavering Resolve
oldBenefit: Gain a +5 bonus to Will Defense against Deception and Persuasion checks.
newEffect: You gain a +5 insight bonus to Will Defense against Deception and Persuasion checks.
oldSummary: Gain a +5 bonus to Will Defense against Deception and Persuasion checks.
newSummary: Gain a +5 bonus to Will Defense against Deception and Persuasion checks.

name: Headstrong
oldBenefit: You gain a +2 bonus on Will Defense against fear effects and may reroll a failed Will Defense check once per encounter.
newEffect: You gain a +2 bonus on Will Defense against fear effects and may reroll a failed Will Defense check once per encounter.
oldSummary: You gain a +2 bonus on Will Defense against fear effects and may reroll a failed Will Defense check once per encounter.
newSummary: You gain a +2 bonus on Will Defense against fear effects and may reroll a failed Will Defense check once per encounter.

name: Recurring Success
oldBenefit: Gain extra use of a 1/encounter Talent or Feat.
newEffect: When you select this Feat, choose one Talent or Feat that can normally be used once per encounter. You can use that Talent or Feat one additional time per encounter.
oldSummary: Gain extra use of a 1/encounter Talent or Feat.
newSummary: Gain extra use of a 1/encounter Talent or Feat.

name: Aquatic Specialists
oldBenefit: Gain bonuses on Swim checks when near allies.
newEffect: Gain bonuses on Swim checks when near allies.
oldSummary: Gain bonuses on Swim checks when near allies.
newSummary: Gain bonuses on Swim checks when near allies.

name: Sniper
oldPrerequisite: Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, Base Attack Bonus +4
newPrerequisite: Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, Base Attack Bonus +4
oldBenefit: You ignore Soft Cover when making a ranged attack.
newEffect: You always ignore Soft Cover (that is, Cover provided by a character, creature, or Droid) when you make a ranged attack.
oldSummary: You ignore Soft Cover when making a ranged attack.
newSummary: You ignore Soft Cover when making a ranged attack.

name: Improved Grapple
oldBenefit: You gain a +5 bonus on grapple checks and do not provoke attacks of opportunity when initiating a grapple.
newEffect: You gain a +5 bonus on grapple checks and do not provoke attacks of opportunity when initiating a grapple.
oldSummary: You gain a +5 bonus on grapple checks and do not provoke attacks of opportunity when initiating a grapple.
newSummary: You gain a +5 bonus on grapple checks and do not provoke attacks of opportunity when initiating a grapple.

name: Improved Sleight of Hand
oldPrerequisite: Dexterity 15, Skill Focus (Deception), Trained in Stealth
newPrerequisite: Dexterity 15, Skill Focus (Deception), Trained in Stealth
oldBenefit: Use Deception to aid your Stealth check to use Sleight of Hand; use Stealth to draw and palm a weapon simultaneously.
newEffect:
When using the Sleight of Hand application of the Stealth Skill, you can use your Deception Skill to improve your chances of success. Prior to making the Stealth check, you can make a Deception check as a Swift Action. The opposed Perception check of anyone attempting to notice your action must exceed both your Deception check and your Stealth check.

Additionally, you can, as a single Action, use Improved Sleight of Hand to simultaneously draw and palm a weapon two sizes smaller than you. Make a Stealth check as a Free Action when drawing your weapon to successfully conceal it in a position in your hand (Or similar appendage), where you can use it on a following Action. Once the weapon is used, you can attempt to palm it again as a Swift Action.
oldSummary: Use Deception to aid your Stealth check to use Sleight of Hand; use Stealth to draw and palm a weapon simultaneously.
newSummary: Use Deception to aid your Stealth check to use Sleight of Hand; use Stealth to draw and palm a weapon simultaneously.

name: Leader of Droids
oldBenefit: Allied Droids benefit from your beneficial Mind-Affecting effects.
newEffect: Whenever you provide a beneficial, Mind-Affecting effect to your allies, you may select from among these allies a number of Droids equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum 1). The Droids you designate ignore their Mind-Affecting immunity with regards to this effect, provided they are willing to ignore this immunity.
oldSummary: Allied Droids benefit from your beneficial Mind-Affecting effects.
newSummary: Allied Droids benefit from your beneficial Mind-Affecting effects.

name: Perfect Intuition
oldBenefit: Reroll Initiative checks, always keeping the better result.
newEffect: Reroll Initiative checks, always keeping the better result.
oldSummary: Reroll Initiative checks, always keeping the better result.
newSummary: Reroll Initiative checks, always keeping the better result.

name: Linguist
oldBenefit: Gain bonus Languages equal to 1 + your Intelligence modifier (minimum 1).
newEffect: You gain a number of additional Languages equal to 1 + your Intelligence modifier (Minimum 1).
oldSummary: Gain bonus Languages equal to 1 + your Intelligence modifier (minimum 1).
newSummary: Gain bonus Languages equal to 1 + your Intelligence modifier (minimum 1).

name: Recovering Surge
oldBenefit: Move up the Condition Track when you catch a Second Wind.
newEffect: When you catch a Second Wind, you move +1 step on the Condition Track.
oldSummary: Move up the Condition Track when you catch a Second Wind.
newSummary: Move up the Condition Track when you catch a Second Wind.

name: Martial Arts II
oldPrerequisite: Martial Arts I, Base Attack Bonus +3
newPrerequisite: Martial Arts I, Base Attack Bonus +3.
oldBenefit: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.
newEffect: Damage dealt by your Unarmed attacks increases by one die step. In addition, you gain a +1 dodge bonus to your Reflex Defense (Which stacks with the dodge bonus granted by the Martial Arts I Feat).
oldSummary: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.
newSummary: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.

name: Wicked Strike
oldBenefit: Gain extra attack on a second target upon damaging the first target.
newEffect: When you damage a target with a single, non- Area Attack using the Rapid Strike Feat, once per turn on your turn, you can immediately make a second attack at a -2 penalty against a second target within your reach. If this attack hits, you deal half of the original attack's damage to that target.
oldSummary: Gain extra attack on a second target upon damaging the first target.
newSummary: Gain extra attack on a second target upon damaging the first target.

name: Educated
oldBenefit: Choose two Knowledge skills. You gain a +5 bonus on checks with those skills.
newEffect: Choose two Knowledge skills. You gain a +5 bonus on checks with those skills.
oldSummary: Choose two Knowledge skills.
newSummary: Choose two Knowledge skills.

name: Droid Hunter
oldBenefit: Deal +2 damage to Droid enemies, or +4 when using an Ion Weapon.
newEffect: While wielding a weapon with which you are proficient, you gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls against Droid enemies, or +4 if you are using a weapon that deals Ion Damage.
oldSummary: Deal +2 damage to Droid enemies, or +4 when using an Ion Weapon.
newSummary: Deal +2 damage to Droid enemies, or +4 when using an Ion Weapon.

name: Experienced Medic
oldBenefit: Perform Surgery on multiple creatures simultaneously.
newEffect: You can perform Surgery on a number of creatures equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum 2) simultaneously. You make Treat Injury checks for each individual creature as normal.
oldSummary: Perform Surgery on multiple creatures simultaneously.
newSummary: Perform Surgery on multiple creatures simultaneously.

name: Vehicular Surge
oldBenefit: Once per day, gain Bonus Hit Points for a Vehicle you Pilot.
newEffect: If the Vehicle you Pilot is Colossal or smaller and is reduced to fewer than one-half its maximum Hit Points, once per day as a Swift Action your Vehicle gains a number of Bonus Hit Points equal to one-quarter its maximum Hit Point total. Damage is subtracted from Bonus Hit Points first, and any Bonus Hit Points remaining at the end of the encounter are lost. Bonus Hit Points do not stack.
oldSummary: Once per day, gain Bonus Hit Points for a Vehicle you Pilot.
newSummary: Once per day, gain Bonus Hit Points for a Vehicle you Pilot.

name: Attack Combo (Melee)
oldBenefit: Deal +1 die of damage on Unarmed or melee attacks until the end of your next turn after hitting an enemy with two Unarmed or melee attacks.
newEffect: If you hit a single target with two consecutive melee and/or Unarmed attacks during the same turn, any additional melee or Unarmed attacks you make until the end of your next turn (including Attacks of Opportunity and attacks made as Reactions) deal +1 die of damage on a hit. This extra damage stacks with extra damage granted by other Feats or Talents.
oldSummary: Deal +1 die of damage on Unarmed or melee attacks until the end of your next turn after hitting an enemy with two Unarmed or melee attacks.
newSummary: Deal +1 die of damage on Unarmed or melee attacks until the end of your next turn after hitting an enemy with two Unarmed or melee attacks.

name: Whirlwind Attack
oldPrerequisite: Dexterity 13, Intelligence 13, Melee Defense, Base Attack Bonus +4
newPrerequisite: Dexterity 13, Intelligence 13, Melee Defense, Base Attack Bonus +4
oldBenefit: Make one melee attack against each opponent within reach.
newEffect: As a Full-Round Action, you can make an Area Attack with your melee weapon, striking every target within your reach. This Whirlwind Attack uses the Area Attack rules; you make one attack roll and apply the result to every target in range.
oldSummary: Make one melee attack against each opponent within reach.
newSummary: Make one melee attack against each opponent within reach.

name: Nikto Survival
oldBenefit: Reroll Survival checks in native environment.
newEffect: Select a Nikto subspecies: Kajain'sa'Nikto (Desert), Kadas'sa'Nikto (Forest), Esral'sa'Nikto (Mountains), Gluss'sa'Nikto (Ocean), M'shento'su,Nikto (Arctic). In addition to the usual Nikto Species Traits, when operating in an environment advantageous to your native subspecies, you can reroll any Survival check, taking the better result.
oldSummary: Reroll Survival checks in native environment.
newSummary: Reroll Survival checks in native environment.

name: Knife Trick
oldPrerequisite: Lightning Draw, Quick Draw, Trained in Stealth
newPrerequisite: Lightning Draw, Quick Draw, Trained in Stealth
oldBenefit: Attack of Opportunity with concealed weapon to greater effect.
newEffect:
If you have a concealed weapon, you Threaten squares as though armed with a melee weapon. When you can make an Attack of Opportunity, you can draw a weapon you have successfully concealed on your person and make a single attack against the target.

If you choose not to draw your concealed weapon and attack with it, you cannot make the Attack of Opportunity unless you would otherwise normally be able to do so.
oldSummary: Attack of Opportunity with concealed weapon to greater effect.
newSummary: Attack of Opportunity with concealed weapon to greater effect.

name: Forceful Recovery
oldBenefit: Regain one Force Power when you catch a Second Wind.
newEffect: Whenever you catch a Second Wind, choose one expended Force Power and return that power to your Force Power Suite.
oldSummary: Regain one Force Power when you catch a Second Wind.
newSummary: Regain one Force Power when you catch a Second Wind.

name: Careful Shot
newPrerequisite: Point-Blank Shot Feat, Base Attack Bonus +2
oldBenefit: If you Aim, gain +1 bonus on the attack roll.
newEffect: If you Aim before making a ranged attack, you gain a +1 bonus on your attack roll.
oldSummary: If you Aim, gain +1 bonus on the attack roll.
newSummary: If you Aim, gain +1 bonus on the attack roll.

name: Flood of Fire
oldBenefit: Ignore enemies' dodge and deflection bonus to Reflex Defense when making Area Attacks with a weapon set on Autofire.
newEffect: When you make an Area Attack with a weapon set on Autofire, and you are proficient with that weapon, all targets in the area lose all dodge or deflection bonuses to Reflex Defense against the Autofire attack.
oldSummary: Ignore enemies' dodge and deflection bonus to Reflex Defense when making Area Attacks with a weapon set on Autofire.
newSummary: Ignore enemies' dodge and deflection bonus to Reflex Defense when making Area Attacks with a weapon set on Autofire.

name: Turn and Burn
oldPrerequisite: Droid with Hovering, Flying, Wheeled, or Tracked Locomotion; Dexterity 13
newPrerequisite: Droid; Hovering, Flying, Wheeled, or Tracked Locomotion; Dexterity 13
oldBenefit: Withdraw by clearing threatened squares in up to 2 squares of movement, move your Speed when using the Withdraw Action. Withdraw as a Reaction by spending a Force Point.
newEffect: When using the Withdraw Action, you can move up to 2 squares to escape Threatened squares without provoking an Attack of Opportunity, and you can move your Speed. You can spend a Force Point as a Reaction to an enemy ending its movement adjacent to you to Withdraw.
oldSummary: Withdraw by clearing threatened squares in up to 2 squares of movement, move your Speed when using the Withdraw Action.
newSummary: Withdraw by clearing threatened squares in up to 2 squares of movement, move your Speed when using the Withdraw Action. Withdraw as a Reaction by spending a Force Point.

name: Impulsive Flight
oldBenefit: Withdraw faster.
newEffect: You can Withdraw one extra square using the Withdraw Action.
oldSummary: Withdraw faster.
newSummary: Withdraw faster.

name: Resolute Stance
oldBenefit: Gain +2 or +5 to Will Defense when you Fight Defensively.
newEffect: When you Fight Defensively, you gain a +2 morale bonus to your Will Defense. If you make no attacks until your next turn, you gain a +5 morale bonus to your Will Defense until the start of your next turn.
oldSummary: Gain +2 or +5 to Will Defense when you Fight Defensively.
newSummary: Gain +2 or +5 to Will Defense when you Fight Defensively.

name: Swarm
oldBenefit: Gain +1 bonus on melee attack rolls when allies are adjacent.
newEffect: You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on melee attack rolls for each allied character adjacent to your target.
oldSummary: Gain +1 bonus on melee attack rolls when allies are adjacent.
newSummary: Gain +1 bonus on melee attack rolls when allies are adjacent.

name: Keen Force Mind
oldBenefit: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate mind-affecting Force powers.
newEffect: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate mind-affecting Force powers.
oldSummary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate mind-affecting Force powers.
newSummary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate mind-affecting Force powers.

name: Triple Attack
oldPrerequisite: Base Attack Bonus +11, Double Attack (Chosen Weapon)
newPrerequisite: Base Attack Bonus +11, Double Attack (Chosen Weapon)
oldBenefit: Make second extra attack with chosen weapon during Full Attack, additional -5 penalty to all attacks.
newEffect: Choose a single Exotic Weapon or weapon group. When you use the Full Attack Action, you may make one additional attack when wielding such a Weapon. However, you take a -5 penalty on all attack rolls until your next turn because you're trading precision for speed. The extra attack and penalty stack with those of Double Attack.
oldSummary: Make second extra attack with chosen weapon during Full Attack, additional -5 penalty to all attacks.
newSummary: Make second extra attack with chosen weapon during Full Attack, additional -5 penalty to all attacks.

name: Distracting Droid
oldBenefit: Attempt to deny enemies within 6 squares their next Move Action, with a chance to make enemies Flat-Footed.
newEffect: As a Standard Action, make a Persuasion check against the Will Defense of all enemies that are within 6 squares of you and that can see or hear you, as determined by the Gamemaster. If the check equals or exceeds an enemy's Will Defense, the enemy loses one Move Action on its next turn. If the attack exceeds an enemy's Will Defense by 10 or more, the enemy is also Flat-Footed until the start of your next turn. This is a Mind-Affecting effect.
oldSummary: Attempt to deny enemies within 6 squares their next Move Action, with a chance to make enemies Flat-Footed.
newSummary: Attempt to deny enemies within 6 squares their next Move Action, with a chance to make enemies Flat-Footed.

name: Forceful Slam
oldPrerequisite: Trained in Use the Force, Force Slam
newPrerequisite: Trained in Use the Force, Force Slam
oldBenefit: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate Force Slam.
newEffect: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate Force Slam.
oldSummary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate Force Slam.
newSummary: You gain a +2 bonus on Use the Force checks made to activate Force Slam.

name: Mandalorian Training
oldBenefit: Gain a +2 bonus on attack rolls when using the Charging Fire feat.
newEffect: When using the Charging Fire Feat, you gain a +2 bonus to a ranged attack made at the end of a Charge. As with a normal Charge, you still take a -2 penalty to your Reflex Defense, but you also gain a +2 morale bonus to your Will Defense until the beginning of your next turn.
oldSummary: Gain a +2 bonus on attack rolls when using the Charging Fire feat.
newSummary: Gain a +2 bonus on attack rolls when using the Charging Fire feat.

name: Demoralizing Strike
oldBenefit: Make an Intimidation check when you deal damage with an Attack of Opportunity.
newEffect: When you successfully deal damage to an opponent with an Attack of Opportunity, you can immediately make a Persuasion check to Intimidate the opponent as a Free Action.
oldSummary: Make an Intimidation check when you deal damage with an Attack of Opportunity.
newSummary: Make an Intimidation check when you deal damage with an Attack of Opportunity.

name: Tae-Jitsu Training
oldPrerequisite: Dodge, Martial Arts I, Trained in Initiative
newPrerequisite: Dodge, Martial Arts I, Trained in Initiative
oldBenefit: Deal more damage on critical hits. Use Dodge against enemies.
newEffect: Deal more damage on critical hits. Use Dodge against enemies.
oldSummary: Deal more damage on critical hits.
newSummary: Deal more damage on critical hits.

name: Elder's Knowledge
oldPrerequisite: Skill Focus (Knowledge (Social Sciences)) or Skill Focus (Knowledge (Galactic Lore))
newPrerequisite: Skill Focus (Knowledge (Galactic Lore)) or Skill Focus (Knowledge (Social Sciences))
oldBenefit: Substitute a Knowledge (Social Sciences) or Knowledge (Galactic Lore) skill check for a Wisdom-related Skill Check.
newEffect: Once per encounter, you can substitute a Knowledge (Galactic Lore) or Knowledge (Social Sciences) check for a Wisdom or Wisdom -related check.
oldSummary: Substitute a Knowledge (Social Sciences) or Knowledge (Galactic Lore) skill check for a Wisdom-related Skill Check.
newSummary: Substitute a Knowledge (Social Sciences) or Knowledge (Galactic Lore) skill check for a Wisdom -related Skill Check.

name: Scavenger
oldBenefit: Gather materials for building objects
newEffect: You can spend 1 hour scavenging materials from other Vehicles or objects. When you do so, you make a Perception check to determine the value of the parts scavenged. You produce raw materials equal in value to the result of your Perception check x 30 credits. You must apply these raw materials toward the cost of construction of a single object (see Build Object), and you can scavenge parts for only a single object at any given time. Additionally, you can scavenge raw materials only once for any given object you are attempting to build.
oldSummary: Gather materials for building objects.
newSummary: Gather materials for building objects

name: Trustworthy
oldBenefit: You gain a +2 bonus on Persuasion checks and may reroll a failed Persuasion check once per encounter.
newEffect: You gain a +2 bonus on Persuasion checks and may reroll a failed Persuasion check once per encounter.
oldSummary: You gain a +2 bonus on Persuasion checks and may reroll a failed Persuasion check once per encounter.
newSummary: You gain a +2 bonus on Persuasion checks and may reroll a failed Persuasion check once per encounter.

name: Hijkata Training
oldBenefit: Make counterattacks. Impose penalties to enemy attacks.
newEffect: Make counterattacks. Impose penalties to enemy attacks.
oldSummary: Make counterattacks.
newSummary: Make counterattacks.

name: Crossfire
oldPrerequisite: Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, Base Attack Bonus +6
newPrerequisite: Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, Base Attack Bonus +6
oldBenefit: Redirect missed attacks against Soft Cover.
newEffect: If you miss when making a ranged attack against a target that has Soft Cover (that is, Cover provided by another character, creature, or Droid), you can immediately make an attack roll (with the same weapon and at the same attack bonus) against the target that is providing the Soft Cover. You can only use this Feat once per round.
oldSummary: Redirect missed attacks against Soft Cover.
newSummary: Redirect missed attacks against Soft Cover.

name: Deadeye
oldPrerequisite: Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, Base Attack Bonus +4
newPrerequisite: Point-Blank Shot, Precise Shot, Base Attack Bonus +4
oldBenefit: If you Aim, deal extra damage.
newEffect: If you Aim before making a ranged attack and the attack hits, increase the damage you deal by an additional weapon die (3d6 becomes 4d6).
oldSummary: If you Aim, deal extra damage.
newSummary: If you Aim, deal extra damage.

name: Risk Taker
oldBenefit: Improve your chances of success with Climb or Jump checks.
newEffect: You fall only if you fail a Climb check by 10 or more. Additionally, if you make a Jump check and fail to land on a safe or solid surface (such as if you fall into a pit or fail to clear a stream of lava), you can spend a Force Point as a Free Action and add the result of the Force Point roll to your distance jumped. However, you must land in the first available safe square.
oldSummary: Improve your chances of success with Climb or Jump checks.
newSummary: Improve your chances of success with Climb or Jump checks.

name: Redirect Shot
oldPrerequisite: Trained in Use the Force, Deflect
newPrerequisite: Trained in Use the Force, Deflect
oldBenefit: When you successfully negate a ranged attack with Deflect, you may redirect the shot to another target within line of sight.
newEffect: When you successfully negate a ranged attack with Deflect, you may redirect the shot to another target within line of sight.
oldSummary: When you successfully negate a ranged attack with Deflect, you may redirect the shot to another target within line of sight.
newSummary: When you successfully negate a ranged attack with Deflect, you may redirect the shot to another target within line of sight.

name: Deadly Sniper
oldPrerequisite: Sniper, Trained in Stealth, Base Attack Bonus +9
newPrerequisite: Sniper, Trained in Stealth, Base Attack Bonus +9
oldBenefit: Gain +2 bonus on your ranged attack roll and deal +1 die of damage.
newEffect: When you make a ranged attack against a target that is unaware of you, you gain a +2 bonus on your attack roll and deal +1 die of damage on the first attack each turn.
oldSummary: Gain +2 bonus on your ranged attack roll and deal +1 die of damage.
newSummary: Gain +2 bonus on your ranged attack roll and deal +1 die of damage.

name: Gunnery Specialist
oldBenefit: Reroll an attack made with a Vehicle Weapon.
newEffect: While you are the Gunner of a Vehicle, you are considered proficient with Vehicle Weapons. Additionally, once per encounter, you can reroll an attack roll made with a Vehicle Weapon, though you must keep the second result, even if it is worse. You can declare this reroll after you learn the result of the attack roll, but before damage is resolved.
oldSummary: Reroll an attack made with a Vehicle Weapon.
newSummary: Reroll an attack made with a Vehicle Weapon.

name: Perfect Swimmer
oldBenefit: Reroll Swim checks, always keeping the better result.
newEffect: Reroll Swim checks, always keeping the better result.
oldSummary: Reroll Swim checks, always keeping the better result.
newSummary: Reroll Swim checks, always keeping the better result.

name: Instinctive Attack
oldBenefit: Spend a Force Point to reroll an attack and take the better result.
newEffect: When you use a Force Point when making an attack with a weapon with which you are proficient, you can reroll the attack and take the better result. Apply the results of the die from the Force Point to the better result.
oldSummary: Spend a Force Point to reroll an attack and take the better result.
newSummary: Spend a Force Point to reroll an attack and take the better result.

name: Combat Reflexes
oldBenefit: Gain additional Attacks of Opportunity.
newEffect:
When opponents leave themselves open, you may make a number of additional Attacks of Opportunity equal to your Dexterity modifier.

With this Feat, you may also make Attacks of Opportunity while Flat-Footed. You can still only make one attack for each triggered Attack of Opportunity.
oldSummary: Gain additional Attacks of Opportunity.
newSummary: Gain additional Attacks of Opportunity.

name: Strong in the Force
oldBenefit: Roll d8s instead of d6s when you spend a Force Point.
newEffect: When you spend a Force Point to adjust the result of an attack roll, Skill Check, or Ability Check, you roll d8s instead of d6s.
oldSummary: Roll d8s instead of d6s when you spend a Force Point.
newSummary: Roll d8s instead of d6s when you spend a Force Point.

name: Grand Army of the Republic Training
oldBenefit: Apply your armor's Equipment bonus to your Will Defense.
newEffect: If you wear Armor that provides an Equipment bonus to your Fortitude Defense, and you are proficient with that Armor, you also apply the Armor's Equipment bonus to your Will Defense.
oldSummary: Apply your armor's Equipment bonus to your Will Defense.
newSummary: Apply your armor's Equipment bonus to your Will Defense.

name: Unhindered Approach
oldBenefit: Gain bonuses on Jump checks checks when near allies.
newEffect: Gain bonuses on Jump checks checks when near allies.
oldSummary: Gain bonuses on Jump checks checks when near allies.
newSummary: Gain bonuses on Jump checks checks when near allies.

name: Acrobatic Ally
oldBenefit: Hoist or toss an ally of your size or smaller up to 2 squares.
newEffect: You can hoist or toss an ally of your size or smaller up to 2 squares. You and your ally must act on the same Initiative Count and start in adjacent squares. If you succeed on a DC 20 Acrobatics check as a Standard Action, your ally ends up in a square of your choosing up to 2 squares above or away from you. This counts as a Free Action for your ally and ends your turn. Your ally can then continue his or her turn. If you fail your check, both you and your ally immediately become Prone in your square. Your turn is ended, but your ally can take his or her turn normally.
oldSummary: Hoist or toss an ally of your size or smaller up to 2 squares.
newSummary: Hoist or toss an ally of your size or smaller up to 2 squares.

name: Returning Bug
oldBenefit: Thrown Razor Bugs and Thud Bugs return to your hand immediately.
newEffect: When you miss with a Razor Bug or a Thud Bug, the weapon returns to your hand immediately.
oldSummary: Thrown Razor Bugs and Thud Bugs return to your hand immediately.
newSummary: Thrown Razor Bugs and Thud Bugs return to your hand immediately.

name: Nimble Team
oldBenefit: Gain bonuses on Acrobatics checks when near allies.
newEffect: Gain bonuses on Acrobatics checks when near allies.
oldSummary: Gain bonuses on Acrobatics checks when near allies.
newSummary: Gain bonuses on Acrobatics checks when near allies.

name: Deceptive Drop
oldBenefit: Flat-Footed targets knocked Prone on Surprise Round.
oldSummary: Flat-Footed targets knocked Prone on Surprise Round.
newSummary: Flat-Footed targets knocked Prone on Surprise Round.

name: Covert Operatives
oldBenefit: Gain bonuses on Stealth checks when near allies.
newEffect: Gain bonuses on Stealth checks when near allies.
oldSummary: Gain bonuses on Stealth checks when near allies.
newSummary: Gain bonuses on Stealth checks when near allies.

name: Greater Weapon Focus
oldPrerequisite: Weapon Focus with selected weapon group, base attack bonus +8
newPrerequisite: Weapon Focus with selected weapon group, base attack bonus +8
oldBenefit: You gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls with the selected weapon group. This stacks with Weapon Focus.
newEffect: You gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls with the selected weapon group. This stacks with Weapon Focus.
oldSummary: You gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls with the selected weapon group.
newSummary: You gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls with the selected weapon group.

name: Weapon Proficiency (Rifles)
oldBenefit: You are proficient with rifles and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.
newEffect: You are proficient with rifles and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.
oldSummary: You are proficient with rifles and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.
newSummary: You are proficient with rifles and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.

name: Armor Proficiency (light)
oldBenefit: No penalty on attacks and no Armor Check Penalty while wearing Light Armor.
newEffect: When you wear Light Armor, you take no Armor Check Penalty on attack rolls or Skill Checks. Additionally, you benefit from all of the armor's special Equipment bonuses (if any).
oldSummary: No penalty on attacks and no Armor Check Penalty while wearing Light Armor.
newSummary: No penalty on attacks and no Armor Check Penalty while wearing Light Armor.

name: Frightening Presence
oldBenefit: When you use Frightful Presence, targets that fail their Will Defense check move -2 steps down the condition track instead of -1.
newEffect: When you use Frightful Presence, targets that fail their Will Defense check move -2 steps down the condition track instead of -1.
oldSummary: When you use Frightful Presence, targets that fail their Will Defense check move -2 steps down the condition track instead of -1.
newSummary: When you use Frightful Presence, targets that fail their Will Defense check move -2 steps down the condition track instead of -1.

name: Slicer Team
oldBenefit: Gain bonuses on Use Computer checks when near allies.
newEffect: Gain bonuses on Use Computer checks when near allies.
oldSummary: Gain bonuses on Use Computer checks when near allies.
newSummary: Gain bonuses on Use Computer checks when near allies.

name: Biotech Surgery
oldBenefit: Install a Bio-Implant on a living being.
newEffect: You can install Bio-Implants onto a living being. The surgical procedure takes 1 hour of uninterrupted work, after which you must make a DC 20 Treat Injury check. If the check succeeds, the prosthesis is installed correctly. If the check fails, the prosthesis is not installed properly; however, you can try again after another uninterrupted hour of surgery.
oldSummary: Install a Bio-Implant on a living being.
newSummary: Install a Bio-Implant on a living being.

name: Crush
oldBenefit: Deal Unarmed or Claw damage to a Pinned opponent.
newEffect: If you successfully Pin an opponent with a Grapple attack (see Pin Feat for more details), you can immediately deal bludgeoning damage to it equal to your Unarmed damage or claw damage, whichever is greater.
oldSummary: Deal Unarmed or Claw damage to a Pinned opponent.
newSummary: Deal Unarmed or Claw damage to a Pinned opponent.

name: Weapon Specialization
oldPrerequisite: Soldier level 4, Weapon Focus with selected weapon group
newPrerequisite: Soldier level 4, Weapon Focus with selected weapon group
oldBenefit: You gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls with the selected weapon group.
newEffect: You gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls with the selected weapon group.
oldSummary: You gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls with the selected weapon group.
newSummary: You gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls with the selected weapon group.

name: Trench Warrior
oldBenefit: When you have Cover against an enemy's ranged attacks, gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls against that enemy.
newEffect: When you are adjacent to a wall or object that provides you with Cover from your target's ranged attacks, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus on your attack rolls against that target.
oldSummary: When you have Cover against an enemy's ranged attacks, gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls against that enemy.
newSummary: When you have Cover against an enemy's ranged attacks, gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls against that enemy.

name: Imperial Military Training
oldBenefit: Negate one Mind-Affecting effect per encounter.
newEffect: Once per encounter, as a Free Action on your turn, you can negate any one Mind-Affecting effect targeting or currently affecting you.
oldSummary: Negate one Mind-Affecting effect per encounter.
newSummary: Negate one Mind-Affecting effect per encounter.

name: Overwhelming Attack
oldBenefit: Any attempt to negate your attack takes a -5 penalty on the attack roll or Skill Check.
newEffect: You must spend two Swift Actions in the same round to activate this Feat. If your target attempts to use a Talent, Feat, or other ability to negate your attack (Such as Block, Deflect, or Vehicular Combat), the target takes a -5 penalty to any attack rolls or Skill Checks it makes to negate the attack. This effect applies to the next attack you make before the end of the same round.
oldSummary: Any attempt to negate your attack takes a -5 penalty on the attack roll or Skill Check.
newSummary: Any attempt to negate your attack takes a -5 penalty on the attack roll or Skill Check.

name: Aiming Accuracy
oldBenefit: After aiming as a Full-Round Action, gain a +5 on next weapon attack.
newEffect: If you Aim at a target as a Full-Round Action (instead of two Swift Actions), you gain a +5 bonus to your next attack made with a weapon with which you are proficient in the following round against that target. The target must remain in your line of sight.
oldSummary: After aiming as a Full-Round Action, gain a +5 on next weapon attack.
newSummary: After aiming as a Full-Round Action, gain a +5 on next weapon attack.

name: Return Fire
oldPrerequisite: Dexterity 15, Quick Draw, Weapon Focus (Chosen Weapon)
newPrerequisite: Dexterity 15, Quick Draw, Weapon Focus (Chosen Weapon)
oldBenefit: You may make a single ranged attack as a Reaction to a ranged attack against you that misses.
newEffect: Select one Exotic Weapon or Weapon Group for which you possess the Weapon Focus feat. Once per encounter as a Reaction, you can make a single ranged attack with the chosen weapon against an enemy that misses you with a ranged attack, provided you have line of sight to the enemy.
oldSummary: You may make a single ranged attack as a Reaction to a ranged attack against you that misses.
newSummary: You may make a single ranged attack as a Reaction to a ranged attack against you that misses.

name: Multi-Grab
oldBenefit: You may Grab two opponents as a Standard Action.
newEffect: As a Standard Action, you may make a Grab attack against two targets adjacent to you (roll a separate attack against each target). You must have two empty hands to use this Feat.
oldSummary: You may Grab two opponents as a Standard Action.
newSummary: You may Grab two opponents as a Standard Action.

name: Weapon Proficiency (Heavy Weapons)
oldBenefit: You are proficient with heavy weapons and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.
newEffect: You are proficient with heavy weapons and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.
oldSummary: You are proficient with heavy weapons and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.
newSummary: You are proficient with heavy weapons and do not take the -5 penalty when using them.

name: Stava Training
oldBenefit: Grab and Grapple as a larger creature. Grab after Charging.
newEffect: Grab and Grapple as a larger creature. Grab after Charging.
oldSummary: Grab and Grapple as a larger creature.
newSummary: Grab and Grapple as a larger creature.

name: Intimidating Presence
oldBenefit: You may use Persuasion to intimidate as a swift action instead of a standard action.
newEffect: You may use Persuasion to intimidate as a swift action instead of a standard action.
oldSummary: You may use Persuasion to intimidate as a swift action instead of a standard action.
newSummary: You may use Persuasion to intimidate as a swift action instead of a standard action.

name: Dual Weapon Mastery I
oldBenefit: Take a -5 penalty on attacks when attacking with two weapons, or both ends of a double weapon.
newEffect: When you attack with two weapons, or with both ends of a double weapon as part of a Full Attack Action, you take a -5 penalty (Instead of a -10 penalty) on all attack rolls until the start of your next turn. You only gain this reduced penalty if you are wielding a weapon with which you are proficient.
oldSummary: Take a -5 penalty on attacks when attacking with two weapons, or both ends of a double weapon.
newSummary: Take a -5 penalty on attacks when attacking with two weapons, or both ends of a double weapon.

name: Forceful Telekinesis
oldPrerequisite: Trained in Use the Force, Move Object
newPrerequisite: Trained in Use the Force, Move Object
oldBenefit: You may spend a Force Point to move a target -1 step down the condition track when using Move Object.
newEffect: You may spend a Force Point to move a target -1 step down the condition track when using Move Object.
oldSummary: You may spend a Force Point to move a target -1 step down the condition track when using Move Object.
newSummary: You may spend a Force Point to move a target -1 step down the condition track when using Move Object.

name: Armor Proficiency (heavy)
newPrerequisite: Armor Proficiency (Light) Feat, Armor Proficiency (Medium) Feat
oldBenefit: No penalty on attacks and no Armor Check Penalty while wearing Light Armor, Medium Armor, or Heavy Armor.
newEffect: When you wear Heavy Armor, you take no Armor Check Penalty on attack rolls or Skill Checks. Additionally, you benefit from all of the armor's special Equipment bonuses (if any).
oldSummary: No penalty on attacks and no Armor Check Penalty while wearing Light Armor, Medium Armor, or Heavy Armor.
newSummary: No penalty on attacks and no Armor Check Penalty while wearing Light Armor, Medium Armor, or Heavy Armor.

name: Heroic Surge
oldBenefit: Once per encounter, you may take an additional standard or move action on your turn.
newEffect: Once per encounter, you may take an additional standard or move action on your turn.
oldSummary: Once per encounter, you may take an additional standard or move action on your turn.
newSummary: Once per encounter, you may take an additional standard or move action on your turn.

name: Sport Hunter
oldBenefit: Gain benefits with certain slugthrowers and sporting weapons.
newEffect:
When you make a ranged attack with a slugthrower or sporting weapon with which you are proficient, you gain one of the following benefits, depending on the kind of weapon you use.

- Slugthrower Pistol: When you use a Slugthrower Pistol at Point-Blank Range, you deal +1 die of damage with the weapon.
- Slugthrower Rifle: When you use a Slugthrower Rifle, the damage dice increase from d8 to d12.
- Sporting Blaster Pistol: When you use a Sporting Blaster Pistol, reroll any result of 1 on the damage dice until you get a result other than 1.
- Sporting Blaster Rifle: When using a Sporting Blaster Rifle, you gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls when you Aim before firing.
oldSummary: Gain benefits with certain slugthrowers and sporting weapons.
newSummary: Gain benefits with certain slugthrowers and sporting weapons.

name: Flawless Pilot
oldBenefit: Reroll Pilot checks, always keeping the better result.
newEffect: Reroll Pilot checks, always keeping the better result.
oldSummary: Reroll Pilot checks, always keeping the better result.
newSummary: Reroll Pilot checks, always keeping the better result.

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
oldBenefit: You reduce the penalty for fighting with two weapons by 2.
newEffect: You reduce the penalty for fighting with two weapons by 2.
oldSummary: You reduce the penalty for fighting with two weapons by 2.
newSummary: You reduce the penalty for fighting with two weapons by 2.

name: Halt
oldPrerequisite: Trip, Weapon Focus (Chosen Weapon), Base Attack Bonus +8
newPrerequisite: Trip, Weapon Focus (Chosen Weapon), Base Attack Bonus +8
oldBenefit: Knock an enemy Prone after a successful Attack of Opportunity, immediately end the target's remaining Actions when also exceeding its Damage Threshold.
newEffect:
If you hit with an Attack of Opportunity, while wielding a weapon for which you possess the Weapon Focus Feat, against an enemy of up to one size larger than you, compare the same die roll against the target's Grapple check. If the die roll succeeds against the Grapple check, the target immediately halts all movement and falls Prone in its current square. The target can spend any remaining Actions normally.

If your attack exceeds the target's Damage Threshold, the target loses any remaining Actions and ends its turn immediately. Apply damage normally to the target regardless of the results of this Feat.
oldSummary: Knock an enemy Prone after a successful Attack of Opportunity, immediately end the target's remaining Actions when also exceeding its Damage Threshold.
newSummary: Knock an enemy Prone after a successful Attack of Opportunity, immediately end the target's remaining Actions when also exceeding its Damage Threshold.

name: Great Cleave
oldPrerequisite: Strength 13, Power Attack, Cleave, Base Attack Bonus +4
newPrerequisite: Strength 13, Cleave, Power Attack, Base Attack Bonus +4.
oldBenefit: No limit to Cleave attacks each round.
newEffect: As the Cleave Feat, except that you have no limit to the number of times you can use it per round.
oldSummary: No limit to Cleave attacks each round.
newSummary: No limit to Cleave attacks each round.

name: Force Readiness
oldBenefit: Spend Force Points even if it is not your turn.
newEffect: You can spend Force Points as a Free Action, even if it is not your turn. All other restrictions to Force Point use still apply.
oldSummary: Spend Force Points even if it is not your turn.
newSummary: Spend Force Points even if it is not your turn.

name: Never Surrender
oldBenefit: Make an Endurance check to prevent falling to 0 Hit Points.
newEffect: The first time you would be reduced to 0 Hit Points in an encounter, you can make an Endurance check as a Reaction, with a DC equal to the number of points of damage being dealt to you. If your check succeeds, you are instead reduced to 1 Hit Point.
oldSummary: Make an Endurance check to prevent falling to 0 Hit Points.
newSummary: Make an Endurance check to prevent falling to 0 Hit Points.

name: Steadying Position
oldBenefit: Deny target's Dexterity bonus to Reflex Defense when you are Prone and Aiming.
newEffect: When you are Prone and Aim before making a ranged attack, your target does not benefit from its Dexterity bonus to its Reflex Defense.
oldSummary: Deny target's Dexterity bonus to Reflex Defense when you are Prone and Aiming.
newSummary: Deny target's Dexterity bonus to Reflex Defense when you are Prone and Aiming.

name: Frightening Cleave
oldPrerequisite: Strength 13, Cleave, Power Attack, Base Attack Bonus +4
newPrerequisite: Strength 13, Cleave, Power Attack, Base Attack Bonus +4
oldBenefit: When you use the Cleave feat, each enemy within 6 squares and line of sight takes a penalty to Reflex Defense, Skill Checks, and attack rolls against you.
newEffect: Immediately after you use the Cleave Feat, each enemy within 6 squares of you and within your line of sight takes a -1 penalty to its Reflex Defense, attack rolls, and Skill Checks against you until the end of the encounter. This penalty stacks with itself to a maximum of -5. This is a Mind-Affecting effect.
oldSummary: When you use the Cleave feat, each enemy within 6 squares and line of sight takes a penalty to Reflex Defense, Skill Checks, and attack rolls against you.
newSummary: When you use the Cleave feat, each enemy within 6 squares and line of sight takes a penalty to Reflex Defense, Skill Checks, and attack rolls against you.

name: Desperate Gambit
oldBenefit: Reroll missed attack by taking a -2 penalty (or -5 for Natural 1) to Reflex Defense.
newEffect: Once per turn, when you miss on an attack roll, you reroll the attack, but you take a -2 penalty to Reflex Defense until the end of your next turn. If your first attack missed because you rolled a Natural 1, you can still use this Feat, but you take a -5 penalty to Reflex Defense instead. You must accept the result of the second roll, even if it's worse than the first.
oldSummary: Reroll missed attack by taking a -2 penalty (or -5 for Natural 1) to Reflex Defense.
newSummary: Reroll missed attack by taking a penalty to Reflex Defense.

name: Opportunistic Trickery
oldBenefit: Sacrifice Attack of Opportunity to reduce target's Reflex Defense by 2.
newEffect: Whenever an opponent provokes an Attack of Opportunity from you, once per turn you can sacrifice that attack to reduce the target's Reflex Defense by 2 for the following round.
oldSummary: Sacrifice Attack of Opportunity to reduce target's Reflex Defense by 2.
newSummary: Sacrifice Attack of Opportunity to reduce target's Reflex Defense by 2.

name: Pall of the Dark Side
oldBenefit: Add half your Dark Side Score to Use the Force checks to resist detection.
newEffect: You can add one-half your Dark Side Score (Minimum 1) to any Use the Force checks made to resist attempts to detect you with the Sense Force application of the Use the Force skill.
oldSummary: Add half your Dark Side Score to Use the Force checks to resist detection.
newSummary: Add half your Dark Side Score to Use the Force checks to resist detection.

name: Cunning Attack
oldBenefit: Gain +2 bonus on attack rolls against Flat-Footed enemies.
newEffect: You gain a +2 bonus on attack rolls against a Flat-Footed enemy or one who is denied its Dexterity bonus to its Reflex Defense.
oldSummary: Gain +2 bonus on attack rolls against Flat-Footed enemies.
newSummary: Gain +2 bonus on attack rolls against Flat-Footed enemies.

name: Silver Tongue
oldBenefit: Intimidate a creature or change its Attitude as a Standard Action.
newEffect: You can Intimidate or Change Attitude as a Standard Action.
oldSummary: Intimidate a creature or change its Attitude as a Standard Action.
newSummary: Intimidate a creature or change its Attitude as a Standard Action.

name: Survivor of Ryloth
oldBenefit: Make Survival checks to resist Extreme Heat and Extreme Cold.
newEffect: Make Survival checks to resist Extreme Heat and Extreme Cold.
oldSummary: Make Survival checks to resist Extreme Heat and Extreme Cold.
newSummary: Make Survival checks to resist Extreme Heat and Extreme Cold.

name: Improved Knock Prone
oldBenefit: You gain a +5 bonus on attack rolls made to knock an opponent prone.
newEffect: You gain a +5 bonus on attack rolls made to knock an opponent prone.
oldSummary: You gain a +5 bonus on attack rolls made to knock an opponent prone.
newSummary: You gain a +5 bonus on attack rolls made to knock an opponent prone.

name: Dreadful Rage
oldPrerequisite: Rage Species Trait, Base Attack Bonus +1
newPrerequisite: Rage Species Trait, Base Attack Bonus +1
oldBenefit: Rage bonus to attacks and damage increases to +5.
newEffect: While Raging, your Rage bonus on melee attack rolls and melee damage rolls increases to +5.
oldSummary: Rage bonus to attacks and damage increases to +5.
newSummary: Rage bonus to attacks and damage increases to +5.

name: Martial Arts I
oldBenefit: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.
newEffect: Damage dealt by your Unarmed Attacks increases by one die step. In addition, you gain a +1 dodge bonus to your Reflex Defense. Additionally, you do not provoke Attacks of Opportunity with Unarmed Attacks.
oldSummary: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.
newSummary: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.

name: Rancor Crush
oldPrerequisite: Strength 15, Crush, Pin, Base Attack Bonus +1
newPrerequisite: Strength 15, Crush, Pin, Base Attack Bonus +1
oldBenefit: Move an enemy -1 step down the Condition Track when using the Crush feat.
newEffect: When you successfully Pin an enemy with the Pin Feat and use the Crush Feat at the same time, the enemy moves -1 step down the Condition Track in addition to taking damage.
oldSummary: Move an enemy -1 step down the Condition Track when using the Crush feat.
newSummary: Move an enemy -1 step down the Condition Track when using the Crush feat.

name: Power Blast
oldBenefit: Trade attack bonus for damage on ranged attacks (up to your Base Attack Bonus).
newEffect: As a Swift Action, before making an attack roll, you can choose to subtract a number from all ranged attack rolls and add the same number to all ranged damage rolls. This number cannot exceed your Base Attack Bonus. The penalty on attacks and bonus on damage applies until the start of your next turn but you gain no bonus to damage with Area Attacks or when attacking objects or Vehicles with this Feat.
oldSummary: Trade attack bonus for damage on ranged attacks (up to your Base Attack Bonus).
newSummary: Trade attack bonus for damage on ranged attacks (up to your Base Attack Bonus).

name: Disabler
oldBenefit: Gain benefits when using certain Ion weapons.
newEffect:
When making a ranged attack with an Ion Weapon with which you are proficient, you gain one of the following benefits, depending on the kind of weapon you use.

- Ion Grenade: When you use an Ion Grenade, the Grenade's Burst radius is 3 squares instead of 2 squares.
- Ion Pistol: When you use an Ion Pistol, the damage dice increase from d6 to d8.
- Ion Rifle: You treat the Ion Rifle as an Accurate Weapon.
oldSummary: Gain benefits when using certain Ion weapons.
newSummary: Gain benefits when using certain Ion weapons.

name: Rapid Shot
oldBenefit: Take a -2 penalty on a ranged attack roll to deal +1 die of damage.
newEffect: When using a ranged weapon with which you are proficient, you may fire two shots as a single attack against a single target. You take a -2 penalty on your attack roll, but you deal +1 die of damage with a successful attack.
oldSummary: Take a -2 penalty on a ranged attack roll to deal +1 die of damage.
newSummary: Take a -2 penalty on a ranged attack roll to deal +1 die of damage.

name: Sniper Shot
oldBenefit: Increase accuracy at a -5 Reflex Defense penalty.
newEffect: When wielding only ranged weapons with which you are proficient, you gain a +2 bonus on all your ranged attacks until the beginning of your next turn, but you take a -5 penalty to Reflex Defense.
oldSummary: Increase accuracy at a -5 Reflex Defense penalty.
newSummary: Increase accuracy at a -5 Reflex Defense penalty.

name: Quick Skill
oldBenefit: Take 10 on Skill Checks when rushed, Take 20 in half of the normal time.
newEffect: Once per encounter, you can Take 10 when rushed on a single Skill Check for a Skill you are Trained in, unless the Skill description explicitly forbids it. Alternatively, you can Take 20 when using a Skill you are Trained in at half the normal time required.
oldSummary: Take 10 on Skill Checks when rushed, Take 20 in half of the normal time.
newSummary: Take 10 on Skill Checks when rushed, Take 20 in half of the normal time.

name: Disarming Charm
oldBenefit: Gain a bonus to Skill Checks on targets whose Attitude you have improved.
newEffect: Gain a bonus to Skill Checks on targets whose Attitude you have improved.
oldSummary: Gain a bonus to Skill Checks on targets whose Attitude you have improved.
newSummary: Gain a bonus to Skill Checks on targets whose Attitude you have improved.

name: Coordinated Attack
oldBenefit: Automatic success with Aid Another action at Point-Blank Range.
newEffect: You are automatically successful when using the Aid Another action to aid an ally's attack, or suppress an enemy as long as the target is adjacent to you or within Point-Blank Range.
oldSummary: Automatic success with Aid Another action at Point-Blank Range.
newSummary: Automatic success with Aid Another action at Point-Blank Range.

name: Improved Damage Threshold
oldBenefit: Damage Threshold increases by 5 points.
newEffect: You increase your Damage Threshold by 5 points.
oldSummary: Damage Threshold increases by 5 points.
newSummary: Damage Threshold increases by 5 points.

name: Fast Talk
oldBenefit: You may make a Persuasion check to feint in combat as a swift action instead of a standard action.
newEffect: You may make a Persuasion check to feint in combat as a swift action instead of a standard action.
oldSummary: You may make a Persuasion check to feint in combat as a swift action instead of a standard action.
newSummary: You may make a Persuasion check to feint in combat as a swift action instead of a standard action.

name: Martial Arts III
oldPrerequisite: Martial Arts I, Martial Arts II, Base Attack Bonus +6
newPrerequisite: Martial Arts I, Martial Arts II, Base Attack Bonus +6
oldBenefit: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.
newEffect: Damage dealt by your Unarmed attacks increases by one die step. In addition, you gain a +1 dodge bonus to your Reflex Defense (Which stacks with the dodge bonuses granted by the Martial Arts I and Martial Arts II Feats).
oldSummary: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.
newSummary: Increases damage from Unarmed attacks by one die step; gain +1 bonus to Reflex Defense.

name: Bantha Herder
oldBenefit: Move a target damaged by your attack.
newEffect:
When you damage a Large or smaller creature with a ranged attack with a weapon you are proficient with, compare the result of your attack roll to the target's Will Defense. If your result equals or exceeds the target's Will Defense, you can move the target 1 square in any direction as a Free Action.

If your ranged attack deals damage to multiple eligible creatures, you can use this benefit against all of them. You can't move a target that's being Grabbed or Grappled, and you can't move a target into a solid object or into another creature's Fighting Space.
oldSummary: Move a target damaged by your attack.
newSummary: Move a target damaged by your attack.

name: Mind of Reason
oldBenefit: Use Wisdom instead of Intelligence for Intelligence-based Skill Checks.
newEffect: Use Wisdom instead of Intelligence for Intelligence-based Skill Checks.
oldSummary: Use Wisdom instead of Intelligence for Intelligence-based Skill Checks.
newSummary: Use Wisdom instead of Intelligence for Intelligence-based Skill Checks.

name: Unswerving Resolve
oldBenefit: Whenever you resist a Fear or Mind-Affecting effect, you gain a temporary Force Point.
newEffect: Whenever you are targeted by a Fear effect or Mind-Affecting effect that fails to affect you, you gain a temporary Force Point. If this Force Point is not used before the end of your next turn, it goes away. If you negate the contingent effect in any way, you do not gain the benefit of this Feat.
oldSummary: Whenever you resist a Fear or Mind-Affecting effect, you gain a temporary Force Point.
newSummary: Whenever you resist a Fear or Mind-Affecting effect, you gain a temporary Force Point.

name: Mighty Throw
oldBenefit: Add Strength bonus to ranged attack rolls.
newEffect: You can add your Strength modifier (in addition to your Dexterity modifier) to your ranged attack bonus when using Thrown Weapons (including Grenades and grenadelike weapons). Also, you can increase the length of each Range category by a number of squares equal to your Strength modifier.
oldSummary: Add Strength bonus to ranged attack rolls.
newSummary: Add Strength bonus to ranged attack rolls.

name: Erratic Target
oldPrerequisite: Droid with Hovering or Flying Locomotion, Dexterity 13, Dodge
newPrerequisite: Droid, Hovering or Flying Locomotion, Dexterity 13, Dodge
oldBenefit: Reduce Speed by up to 2 squares to increase dodge bonus to Reflex Defense.
newEffect: You can reduce your Speed by up to 2 squares to increase your Dodge bonus by 1 for each square of speed you give up, until the start of your next turn. You must move at least 2 squares to gain this benefit.
oldSummary: Reduce Speed by up to 2 squares to increase dodge bonus to Reflex Defense.
newSummary: Reduce Speed by up to 2 squares to increase dodge bonus to Reflex Defense.

name: Great Fortitude
oldBenefit: You gain a +2 bonus to your Fortitude Defense.
newEffect: You gain a +2 bonus to your Fortitude Defense.
oldSummary: You gain a +2 bonus to your Fortitude Defense.
newSummary: You gain a +2 bonus to your Fortitude Defense.

name: Combat Trickery
oldBenefit: Spend two Swift Actions to make Deception check to make enemy Flat-Footed.
newEffect: You can spend two successive Swift Actions on the same turn to make a Deception check against a target's Will Defense. If the check is successful, the target is Flat-Footed against your next attack made before the end of your next turn. Additionally, you can spend a Force Point to extend your target's penalties until the end of encounter.
oldSummary: Spend two Swift Actions to make Deception check to make enemy Flat-Footed.
newSummary: Spend two Swift Actions to make Deception check to make enemy Flat-Footed.

name: Feat of Strength
oldBenefit: Take 10 or Take 20 on one Strength check or related Skill Check per encounter.
newEffect: Once per encounter as a Full-Round Action, you can Take 20 on a Strength check or Strength -based Skill Check (You must be Trained in that Skill), even if distracted or threatened.
oldSummary: Take 10 or Take 20 on one Strength check or related Skill Check per encounter.
newSummary: Take 10 or Take 20 on one Strength check or related Skill Check per encounter.

name: Force Training
newPrerequisite: Force Sensitivity, Trained in Use the Force.
oldBenefit: Learn a number of Force Powers equal to 1 + your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1).
newEffect: You add to your Force Power Suite a number of Force Powers equal to 1 + your Wisdom modifier (Minimum 1). You can add the same Force Power more than once.
oldSummary: Learn a number of Force Powers equal to 1 + your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1).
newSummary: Learn a number of Force Powers equal to 1 + your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1).

name: Targeted Area
oldBenefit: Deal an additional 5 points of damage against one target within a successful Area Attack.
newEffect: When you make a successful Area Attack with a weapon with which you are proficient, select a target hit by the attack. That target takes an additional 5 points of damage from the attack, before applying the effect of the Evasion Talent.
oldSummary: Deal an additional 5 points of damage against one target within a successful Area Attack.
newSummary: Deal an additional 5 points of damage against one target within a successful Area Attack.

name: Slammer
oldPrerequisite: Small or larger Droid with 2+ Appendages, Strength 13
newPrerequisite: Droid, Small size or larger, 2+ Appendages, Strength 13
oldBenefit: Double Strength bonus to damage rolls on this special melee attack.
newEffect: As a Standard Action, you slam two of your Appendages together from either side of an enemy, crushing your target between them. Make a melee attack. If the attack is successful, you deal Unarmed damage with double your Strength bonus. If you also exceed the target's Damage Threshold, it has a Persistent Condition that can only be removed with 8 hours of rest or a DC 20 Treat Injury check.
oldSummary: Double Strength bonus to damage rolls on this special melee attack.
newSummary: Double Strength bonus to damage rolls on this special melee attack.

name: Inborn Resilience
oldBenefit: Reduce one Defense bonus but increase another.
newEffect: Reduce one Defense bonus but increase another.
oldSummary: Reduce one Defense bonus but increase another.
newSummary: Reduce one Defense bonus but increase another.

name: Advantageous Attack
oldBenefit: Add full Heroic Level to attacks against slower enemies.
newEffect: When you make a successful attack against an enemy who has not yet acted in combat, you add your full Heroic Level to damage rolls.
oldSummary: Add full Heroic Level to attacks against slower enemies.
newSummary: Add full Heroic Level to attacks against slower enemies.

name: Devastating Bellow
oldBenefit: Deal more damage with your Bellow attacks.
newEffect: Deal more damage with your Bellow attacks.
oldSummary: Deal more damage with your Bellow attacks.
newSummary: Deal more damage with your Bellow attacks.

name: Vitality Surge
oldBenefit: Catch a Second Wind even when not at or below half Hit Points.
newEffect: You can catch a Second Wind even if you are not at or below half your maximum Hit Points.
oldSummary: Catch a Second Wind even when not at or below half Hit Points.
newSummary: Catch a Second Wind even when not at or below half Hit Points.

name: Flash and Clear
oldBenefit: Gain Concealment against a target you damage with a Burst or Splash weapon.
newEffect: When you damage a target with a Burst or Splash weapon, you gain Concealment against that target until the beginning of your next turn.
oldSummary: Gain Concealment against a target you damage with a Burst or Splash weapon.
newSummary: Gain Concealment against a target you damage with a Burst or Splash weapon.

name: Heavy Hitter
oldBenefit: Add +1 point of damage for every 5 points rolled above the target's Reflex Defense, plus additional benefits when you exceed the target's Damage Threshold.
newEffect: When making an attack roll using a Weapon Emplacement or a Weapon System, you add an additional 1 point of damage for every 5 points you roll above the target's Reflex Defense. If you exceed the target's Damage Threshold, then on its next turn the target cannot attack and its speed is reduced by 2 squares (1 square Starship Scale).
oldSummary: Add +1 point of damage for every 5 points rolled above the target's Reflex Defense, plus additional benefits when you exceed the target's Damage Threshold.
newSummary: Add +1 point of damage for every 5 points rolled above the target's Reflex Defense, plus additional benefits when you exceed the target's Damage Threshold.

name: Rapport
oldBenefit: Grant an additional +2 bonus when using the Aid Another action.
newEffect: When using the Aid Another Action, you grant an additional +2 insight bonus on Skill Checks and attack rolls to the character you are assisting. This bonus does not stack with any bonus provided by the Noble's Coordinate Talent.
oldSummary: Grant an additional +2 bonus when using the Aid Another action.
newSummary: Grant an additional +2 bonus when using the Aid Another action.

name: Fight Through Pain
oldBenefit: Use your Will Defense to determine your Damage Threshold.
newEffect: You can use your Will Defense instead of your Fortitude Defense when determining your Damage Threshold.
oldSummary: Use your Will Defense to determine your Damage Threshold.
newSummary: Use your Will Defense to determine your Damage Threshold.

name: Resilient Strength
oldBenefit: Use Strength or Constitution to determine Fortitude Defense.
newEffect: You can use either your Strength modifier or your Constitution modifier to determine your Fortitude Defense.
oldSummary: Use Strength or Constitution to determine Fortitude Defense.
newSummary: Use Strength or Constitution to determine Fortitude Defense.

name: Expert Briber
oldBenefit: Reduce the time and cost of Bribery attempts.
newEffect: When using the Haggle or Bribery applications of the Persuasion skill, you reduce the DC to reduce the price of the item haggled over by 10.
oldSummary: Reduce the time and cost of Bribery attempts.
newSummary: Reduce the time and cost of Bribery attempts.

name: Superior Tech
oldBenefit: Install superior equipment upgrades.
newEffect:
Select one of the following: Armor, Weapons, Droids, Vehicles, or Devices. You can install advanced Traits when modifying the selected type of equipment. These Traits replace the Traits granted by the Tech Specialist Feat. You may still use the Tech Specialist options if you so choose.

You must pay one-fifth the cost of the Device, Armor, Weapon, Droid, or vehicle you wish to modify or 2,000 credits, whichever is more, before beginning the modification. This fee replaces the normal cost of modification from the Tech Specialist Feat. Completing the modification requires 1 day per 1,000 credits of the modification's cost. At the end of this time, make a DC 30 Mechanics check; you cannot Take 10 or Take 20 on this check. If the check succeeds, the modification is completed successfully, and the object gains the desired Trait. If the check fails, you lose all credits spent on making the modification, and the object does not gain the desired Trait. However, you can start over from scratch if you wish.

Only characters with the Tech Specialist Feat can assist you, reducing proportionately the time needed to complete the modification. At the end of the modification process, they can make a Mechanics check to aid your check.

The market value of a modified item is equal to the base cost of the item plus double the cost of the modifications made to it (not including credits wasted on failed modification attempts).
oldSummary: Install superior equipment upgrades.
newSummary: Install superior equipment upgrades.

name: Logic Upgrade: Tactician
oldBenefit: Grant a +5 bonus to attack with a successful Aid Another attempt.
newEffect: Grant a +5 bonus to attack with a successful Aid Another attempt.
oldSummary: Grant a +5 bonus to attack with a successful Aid Another attempt.
newSummary: Grant a +5 bonus to attack with a successful Aid Another attempt.

name: Trip
oldBenefit: Trip an opponent that you've Grappled, knocking it Prone.
newEffect: If you succeed on a Grappling attack and your opponent fails the opposed Grapple check, it falls Prone in its space and is no longer considered Grappled. A Prone opponent takes a -5 penalty on melee attack rolls. Melee attacks made against a Prone target gain a +5 bonus, while ranged attack made against a prone target take a -5 penalty.
oldSummary: Trip an opponent that you've Grappled, knocking it Prone.
newSummary: Trip an opponent that you've Grappled, knocking it Prone.

name: Charging Fire
oldBenefit: Make ranged attack at end of a Charge; take a -2 penalty to Reflex Defense.
newEffect: When you Charge, you may make a ranged attack instead of a melee attack at the end of your movement. Unlike a normal Charge, your momentum does not help you overcome your target, so you gain no bonus on your attack roll. As with a normal Charge, you still take a -2 penalty to your Reflex Defense.
oldSummary: Make ranged attack at end of a Charge; take a -2 penalty to Reflex Defense.
newSummary: Make ranged attack at end of a Charge; take a -2 penalty to Reflex Defense.

name: Warrior Heritage
oldBenefit: Gain a bonus to Will Defense when using an Atlatl or Cesta.
newEffect: Gain a bonus to Will Defense when using an Atlatl or Cesta.
oldSummary: Gain a bonus to Will Defense when using an Atlatl or Cesta.
newSummary: Gain a bonus to Will Defense when using an Atlatl or Cesta.

name: Skill Training
oldBenefit: You become Trained in one Class Skill.
newEffect: Choose one Untrained Skill from your list of Class Skills. You become Trained in that Skill.
oldSummary: You become Trained in one Class Skill.
newSummary: You become Trained in one Class Skill.

name: Savage Attack
oldBenefit: Add +1 die of damage when successful on a Full Attack.
newEffect: Choose one weapon groups or Exotic Weapon you have selected for the Double Attack Feat. When you use a Full Attack Action and successfully hit the target with your first attack, you deal +1 die of damage on each successful attack remaining in the Full Attack made against that target.
oldSummary: Add +1 die of damage when successful on a Full Attack.
newSummary: Add +1 die of damage when successful on a Full Attack.

name: Mounted Defense
oldBenefit: You are able to react to incoming attacks, using you Mount or Speeder Bike to absorb attacks against you.
newEffect: When riding a Beast as a Mount or on a Speeder Bike (as a passenger or a Pilot), once per encounter you can redirect any attack made against you at your Mount or Vehicle instead. The decision to redirect the attack is made after the result of the attack roll is determined but before damage or other effects are resolved.
oldSummary: You are able to react to incoming attacks, using you Mount or Speeder Bike to absorb attacks against you.
newSummary: You are able to react to incoming attacks, using you Mount or Speeder Bike to absorb attacks against you.

name: Sadistic Strike
oldBenefit: Move opponents -1 step on the Condition Track when you deliver a Coup de Grace.
newEffect: When you deliver a Coup de Grace to a Helpless creature, all opponents within line of sight move -1 step on the Condition Track until the end of encounter.
oldSummary: Move opponents -1 step on the Condition Track when you deliver a Coup de Grace.
newSummary: Move opponents -1 step on the Condition Track when you deliver a Coup de Grace.

name: Lasting Influence
oldBenefit: After a successful Persuasion check, gain a bonus to future Persuasion checks.
newEffect: After a successful Persuasion check, gain a bonus to future Persuasion checks.
oldSummary: After a successful Persuasion check, gain a bonus to future Persuasion checks.
newSummary: After a successful Persuasion check, gain a bonus to future Persuasion checks.

name: Assured Attack
oldBenefit: Reroll the lowest damage die when making a successful attack.
newEffect: Whenever you deal damage to a target with an attack and you roll multiple damage dice, you can reroll the lowest damage die but must keep the second result, even if it is worse.
oldSummary: Reroll the lowest damage die when making a successful attack.
newSummary: Reroll the lowest damage die when making a successful attack.

name: Droidcraft
oldBenefit: Repair a Droid in 10 minutes instead of 1 hour.
newEffect: You can use the Repair Droid aspect of the Mechanics skill in 10 minutes.
oldSummary: Repair a Droid in 10 minutes instead of 1 hour.
newSummary: Repair a Droid in 10 minutes instead of 1 hour.

name: Intuitive Initiative
oldBenefit: You may reroll your Initiative check and take the better result. You must keep the new result even if it is worse.
newEffect: You may reroll your Initiative check and take the better result. You must keep the new result even if it is worse.
oldSummary: You may reroll your Initiative check and take the better result.
newSummary: You may reroll your Initiative check and take the better result.

name: Mounted Combat
oldBenefit: Increase Speed and avoid attacks when riding a Mount.
newEffect:
You can make a DC 20 Ride check as a Swift Action to spur your living Mount to move faster than its normal speed. If the check fails, your Mount's Speed does not increase and it moves -1 step on the Condition Track. If the check succeeds, your Mount's Speed increases by 2 squares until the start of your next turn. You cannot Take 10 on this check. Your Mount must succeed on a DC 20 Endurance check prior to each subsequent attempt to use this Feat in the same encounter.

Additionally, once per round, as a Reaction, when you are riding a Mount, you can negate a weapon hit against either you or the Mount by making a successful Ride check. The DC of the Skill Check is equal to the result of the attack roll you want to negate.
oldSummary: Increase Speed and avoid attacks when riding a Mount.
newSummary: Increase Speed and avoid attacks when riding a Mount.

name: K'thri Training
oldPrerequisite: Dual Weapon Mastery I, Martial Arts I
newPrerequisite: Dual Weapon Mastery I, Martial Arts I

newEffect: Make swift Unarmed attacks. Deal half damage on misses.

newSummary: Make swift Unarmed attacks.

oldBenefit: Treat target's Damage Threshold as lower.
newEffect: Treat target's Damage Threshold as lower.
oldSummary: Treat target's Damage Threshold as lower.
newSummary: Treat target's Damage Threshold as lower.

newEffect: Reduce the cost multiplier of goods bought on the Black Market.
oldSummary: Reduce the cost multiplier of goods bought on the Black Market.
newSummary: Reduce the cost multiplier of goods bought on the Black Market.

newEffect: Gain bonuses on Pilot checks checks when near allies.
